coverageSummary.detailPolicy: Location identities, units, listeners, access routes, journal details and private data paths remain only in owner-controlled evidence.

measurementMethod: registered fleet inventory and bounded reachability probes
local unit, timer, process and listener observation
privacy-preserving service journal and private-data activity aggregates
current source, configuration and workflow scan bound to repository commits

surfaces.usageSignal: The runtime was present during the bounded probe, but the available redacted journal and private-data aggregates did not establish recent operator access.
surfaces.uncertainty: One registered location was unreachable and one could only be partially inspected.

surfaces.usageSignal: The display runtime and its automated refresh lane were observed; human requests were not separable from automation.
surfaces.uncertainty: No bounded signal proves recent human use.

surfaces.usageSignal: Recent access-shaped runtime entries were observed without retaining routes, clients or content.
surfaces.uncertainty: The aggregate does not identify unique users or distinguish every automated request.

surfaces.usageSignal: A scheduled integration lane completed during the observation window; this does not prove that a person viewed the resulting surface.
surfaces.uncertainty: Human review frequency is not measured.

surfaces.usageSignal: Current Bureau, Grabowski, Leitstand, Heimlern and workflow sources contain executable Chronik integration paths, but no matching local runtime was observed.
Current Leitstand, WGX and integration sources consume or validate Heimlern outputs, but no matching local runtime was observed.
surfaces.uncertainty: Source integration does not prove that proposed learning outputs are regularly reviewed.

surfaces.usageSignal: The current scan found planning and self-description references but no external executable consumer path or matching local runtime.
surfaces.uncertainty: An unobserved remote or manual consumer remains possible.

surfaces.usageSignal: Current Bureau and Grabowski code consume bounded Steuerboard repository-state signals, while no separate local runtime was observed.
surfaces.uncertainty: The scan does not prove how often the signal changes an operator decision.

surfaces.usageSignal: Current Lenskit, Chronik, Heimlern, Leitstand and metarepo workflows or loaders consume WGX contracts and metrics, while no separate local runtime was observed.
surfaces.uncertainty: Workflow references do not prove every configured job ran successfully in the observation window.

contains: registered location identities and reachability results
unit, timer, process and listener observations
redacted journal and private-data activity aggregates
source integration matches and repository commits

decisionInputs.T004: All prerequisite consumer classes are now measured. Repository-only catalog consolidation may proceed without stopping services.
decisionInputs.T013: Runtime decoupling still requires explicit authorization, rollback and a fresh preflight because remote coverage remains incomplete and Cabinet human use is not directly measured.
decisionInputs.T014: Repository rename remains gated behind completed runtime decoupling and reference migration.

measurementLimits: Service presence is not human usage.
Automated activity is not human usage.
Browser-history aggregation was not admitted as evidence because the bounded probe did not complete reliably.
One registered location was unreachable and one was only partially inspectable.
Source references prove integration paths, not successful semantic consumption.
